services.title: Every service you need
services.desc: All services include live chat with your booster, real-time status updates, and a full refund guarantee.
services.eloBoostDesc: Rank up from any tier to any tier. Our boosters match your server, role, and champion preferences.
services.winBoostDesc: Buy a set number of wins for quick LP gains. Perfect for promos and daily win bonuses.
services.coachingDesc: 1-on-1 sessions. Your coach analyses your VODs, identifies mistakes, and builds a personalised gameplan.
services.placementsDesc: Start every season at your true rank. We play your placements with a champion pool you approve.

howItWorks.title: 3 steps to your target rank
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick your current and target rank above. See the price instantly. Pay securely via card or PayPal — your card data never touches our servers.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Within minutes, a verified booster matching your server, queue type, and champion preferences accepts your order.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Track progress live. Chat directly with your booster. Pause anytime. Get notified when your target rank is reached.

trust.title: Your account is in safe hands.
trust.desc: We were the first boosting service to implement end-to-end encrypted credentials. No human ever sees your password. Every session runs through a VPN. You get a full paper trail via live order history.

extras.offlineDesc: Hidden from friends list during all sessions.
extras.vpnDesc: Every session runs through a local VPN.
extras.chatDesc: Direct chat with your booster inside your order.
extras.streamDesc: Private stream so you watch every game in real-time.
extras.soloDesc: No duo lobbies — 100% solo ranked games.
extras.guaranteeDesc: Full refund if we cannot complete your order.

boosterRecruit.title: Turn your rank into income.
boosterRecruit.desc: Diamond+ players earn $15–$80 per order on a flexible schedule. Set your own availability, pick the jobs you want, and get paid weekly.
boosterRecruit.req2Sub: We review champion pool, win rate, and KDA.
boosterRecruit.req3Sub: Flexible — you pick which days and sessions.
boosterRecruit.req4Sub: Required for customer chat inside orders.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Prices shown are base rates for solo queue on NA. Final price is calculated in the order builder based on your server, current rank, queue type, and extras.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: How we protect you and your account.

items.vpn: VPN enabled on every gaming session
items.offline: 'Appear Offline' mode — your friends list stays clean
items.noCredentials: No storing of your login credentials beyond the session
items.cleanIp: Boosters operate from devices with clean IP history
items.bcrypt: Supabase Auth with bcrypt password hashing
items.stripe: Card data never touches our servers — Stripe handles it all
items.webhook: Webhook signature validation on every event
items.minimal: Minimal data collection — only what's needed
items.noEmail: Booster never sees your full email or personal details
items.privateUrls: All stored files use private URLs with expiry
items.deletion: Data deletion available on account close
items.rls: Row-Level Security — customers only see their own orders
items.boosters: Boosters can only access jobs assigned to them
items.audit: Admin access is fully audited and logged
items.serverSide: Roles are enforced server-side, never trusting the client
items.encrypted: All data encrypted at rest and in transit (TLS 1.3)
items.soc2: Hosted on Supabase (SOC 2 Type II certified)

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: We use VPN on all sessions, appear-offline mode, and never store your credentials beyond the active order. Our boosters have clean IP histories and follow strict account-safety protocols. We've completed 48,000+ orders without a single permanent ban from our methods.
faq.q2: How long will my order take?
faq.a2: Most orders begin within 30 minutes of payment confirmation. Estimated delivery times are shown before checkout and depend on rank gap, queue type, and server. Priority add-on guarantees a top-rated booster is assigned immediately.
faq.q3: Can I watch my booster play?
faq.a3: Yes — add the 'Live Stream' extra during checkout and you'll receive a private stream link after your order starts. You can watch every game in real time.
faq.q4: What if the order isn't completed?
faq.a4: We offer a 100% completion guarantee. If a booster cannot finish your order for any reason, we reassign it or issue a full refund. No questions asked.
faq.q5: Do I share my account password?
faq.a5: For solo boosting, yes — you share login credentials through our encrypted platform, and they are cleared from our systems as soon as the order finishes. For duo boosting, you play alongside our booster and no credentials are needed.
faq.q6: Can I request a specific champion or role?
faq.a6: Yes. During the order configuration step you can specify role and champion preferences. Add the 'Mono Champion' extra for guaranteed one-champion play.
faq.a7: We support all major League of Legends servers: NA, EUW, EUNE, BR, LAN, LAS, OCE, TR, RU, JP, and KR.
faq.a8: All boosters apply through our platform and go through a multi-step verification: rank proof, identity check, test games review, and a waiting period under observation. Only Diamond IV+ boosters are approved.
faq.q9: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a9: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, and Google Pay, processed securely through Stripe.
faq.q10: Can I chat with my booster?
faq.a10: Absolutely. Every order includes an in-order chat where you can message your booster directly.
faq.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?
